title: Quest Electric Hand Mixer, Black, Chrome Beaters, Dough Hooks & Balloon Whisk, 5 Speed With Turbo Function, 300W
features: ELECTRIC HAND MIXER – This electric hand mixer has a powerful 300W motor that will make light work of whisking, mixing & kneading, providing you with a great helping hand in the kitchen!

5 CHROME ACCESSORIES – The hand mixer comes complete with 2 x dough hooks, 2 x beaters, and 1 x balloon whisk that are easy to attach and detach thanks to the eject button, and are all dishwasher safe.

5 SPEED SETTINGS – This hand mixer for baking has 5 individual speed settings that will allow you to control the texture of the ingredients, as well as a turbo boost button that will give you some extra power when needed.

STYLISH DESIGN – This hand food mixer comes in a stylish black colour, and features a 1-metre electric cable that will allow you freedom in the kitchen to plug in the device and reach your mixing bowl with ease.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Accessories Included Efficient Electric Mixer These Electric Hand Mixers provide a versatile tool for cooking and baking. The mixers are powered by a 300W motor, with 5 different speed & texture settings, as well as a turbo button. Three different colours are available - black, red, and white. Previous page Detachable Beaters The beaters can easily be detached from the mixer, allowing you to safely clean them after use. Simple Controls The speed, turbo, and eject controls are easily accessible, being located on the handle. Accessories Included Along with the two traditional beaters, 2 dough hooks and a balloon whisk attachment are included. Convenient Design The sleek whisk design includes an ergonomic handle, as well as a 1 metre long cable. Chrome Materials All of the attachments are durable and easy to clean thanks to their chrome material. Next page 1 Detachable Beaters 2 Simple Controls 3 Accessories Included 4 Convenient Design 5 Chrome Materials
